Field.Description: ISA Segment Code
Field ISA01 - Authorization Information Qualifier
Field ISA02 - Authorization Info
Field ISA03 - Security Information Qualifier
Field ISA04 - Security Info
Field ISA05 - Interchange ID Qualifier
Field ISA06 - Interchange Sender ID (right-pad to exactly 15 chars)
Field ISA07 - Interchange Receiver ID Qualifier
Field ISA08 - Interchange Receiver ID (right-pad to exactly 15 chars)
Field ISA09 - Interchange Date (YYMMDD)
Field ISA10 - Interchange Time (HHMM)
Field ISA11 - Interchange Control Standards ID
Field ISA12 - Interchange Control Version Number
Field ISA13 - Interchange Control Number
Field ISA14 - Acknowledgment Requested (not related to 997 file)
Field ISA15 - Test Indicator (T = test, P = production)
Field ISA16 - Empty, but needs the field delimiter
Segment Separator
IEA Segment Code
Field IEA01 - Number of Groups
Field IEA02 - Interchange Control Number (must match ISA13)
Segment Separator
GS Segment Code
Field GS01 - Functional ID Code
Field GS02 - Sender Code (not padded)
Field GS03 - Receiver Code (not padded)
Field GS04 - Date
Field GS05 - Time
Field GS06 - Group Control Number (can be same as ISA Ctrl Number)
Field GS07 - Response Agency Code
Field GS08 - Version
Segment Separator
GE Segment Code
Field GE01 - Number of Transactions
Field GE02 - Group Control Number (must match GS06)
Segment Separator
ST Segment Code
Field ST01 - Transaction Code (EDI file type - i.e. 813, 997, etc.)
Field ST02 - Transaction Set Control Number
Segment Separator
SE Segment Code
Field SE01 - Number of Segments (includes ST and SE segments)
Field SE02 - Transaction Set Control Number (must match ST02)
Segment Separator

Property.name: Name
Property.value: Generic Segment (just record, no data fields)

Field.Description: Generic Segment Header Code
Generic Segment Separator
AK1 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK101 - GS Func Id Code (from original GS01)
EDI 997 Field AK102 - Group Control Number (from original GS06)
Segment Separator
AK2 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK201 - Transaction Code (from original ST01)
EDI 997 Field AK202 - Transaction Set Control Number (from original ST02)
Segment Separator
AK5 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK501 - Trans Set Ack Code (A = Accepted, R = Rejected)
EDI 997 Field AK502 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK503 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK504 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK505 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK506 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
AK9 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK901 - Func Group Ack Code (A = Accepted, R = Rejected)
EDI 997 Field AK902 - Number of Trans Sets Included
EDI 997 Field AK903 - Number of Trans Sets Received
EDI 997 Field AK904 - Number of Trans Sets Accepted
EDI 997 Field AK905 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK906 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK907 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 997 Field AK908 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
BTP Segment Code
EDI 838 Field BTP01 - Transaction Set Purpose
EDI 838 Field BTP02 - Bulk Provider TIN
EDI 838 Field BTP03 - Date
EDI 838 Field BTP04 - Time
EDI 838 Field BTP05 - Transaction Type Code
EDI 838 Field BTP06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field BTP07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field BTP08 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field BTP09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field BTP10 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
PER Segment Code
EDI 838 Field PER01 - Contact Function Code
EDI 838 Field PER02 - Contact Name
EDI 838 Field PER03 - Contact Qualifier (TE = telephone number)
EDI 838 Field PER04 - Contact Number
Segment Separator
LX Segment Code
EDI 838 Field LX01 - LX Loop Index
Segment Separator
N1 Segment Code
EDI 838 Field N101 - Entity ID Code (TP = Primary, SY = Secondary)
EDI 838 Field N102 - IRS Name of Record
EDI 838 Field N103 - Type of ID Number (24 = EIN, 34 = SSN, 43 = Secondary SSN)
EDI 838 Field N104 - EIN or primary/secondary SSN
EDI 838 Field N105 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field N106 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
N3 Segment Code (this segment is optional)
EDI 838 Field N301 - Address (optional field)
EDI 838 Field N302 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
N4 Segment Code
EDI 838 Field N401 - City Name (optional field)
EDI 838 Field N402 - State Code (optional field)
EDI 838 Field N403 - Postal or Zip code (required field)
EDI 838 Field N404 - Country Code (optional field)
EDI 838 Field N405 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field N406 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
N9 Segment Code
EDI 838 Field N901 - Reference Number Qualifier (VU = Preparer's Verification Number)
EDI 838 Field N902 - Reference Number (8655)
EDI 838 Field N903 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field N904 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field N905 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 838 Field N906 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
BGN Segment Code
EDI 824 Field BGN01 - Transaction Set Purpose
EDI 824 Field BGN02 - Ref Num
EDI 824 Field BGN03 - Date
EDI 824 Field BGN04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field BGN05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field BGN06 - Transaction Set Control Number (from 838 ST02)
EDI 824 Field BGN07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field BGN08 - Action Code (CF = Confirmed, U = Rejected)
Segment Separator
OTI Segment Code
EDI 824 Field OTI01 - Application Acknowledgment Code (IA = accepted, IR = rejected)
EDI 824 Field OTI02 - Ref Num Qualifier (2I = tracking number)
EDI 824 Field OTI03 - Ref Num (from LX01 in 838)
EDI 824 Field OTI04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI08 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI10 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 824 Field OTI11 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 824 Field REF01 - Reference Number Qualifier (1Q = Error Identification Code, BB = Authorization Number)
EDI 824 Field REF02 - Reference Number
EDI 824 Field REF03 - Description (9999 or Year required to file electronically)
Segment Separator
BTI Segment Code
EDI 813 Field BTI01 - Ref Number Qualifier
EDI 813 Field BTI02 - Ref Number
EDI 813 Field BTI03 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 813 Field BTI04 - ID Code
EDI 813 Field BTI05 - Date
EDI 813 Field BTI06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BTI07 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 813 Field BTI08 - ID Code (Bulk Provider's TIN)
EDI 813 Field BTI09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BTI10 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BTI11 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BTI12 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
DTM Segment Code
EDI 813 Field DTM01 - Date/Time Qualifier
EDI 813 Field DTM02 - Date
Segment Separator
TIA Segment Code
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA01 - Tax Info ID Number
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA02 - Monetary Amount
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA03 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA07 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 813 Field OUTER REF01 - Reference Number Qualifier
EDI 813 Field OUTER REF02 - Reference Number
Segment Separator
BPR Segment Code
EDI 813 Field BPR01 - Transaction Handling Code (Z for next-day, I for same-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR02 - Monetary Amount
EDI 813 Field BPR03 - Credit/Debit Flag (C = credit, D = debit)
EDI 813 Field BPR04 - Payment Method Code (ACH for next-day, FWT for same-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR08 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR10 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR11 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR12 - (DFI) ID Number Qualifier (01 for next-day, blank for same-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR13 - Routing Number (leave blank for same-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR14 - Account Number Qualifier (03 for next-day, blank for same-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR15 - Account Number (leave blank for same-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR16 - Settlement Date
EDI 813 Field BPR17 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR18 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR19 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR20 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field BPR21 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
TFS Segment Code
EDI 813 Field TFS01 - Reference Number Qualifier (T6 = Tax Filing)
EDI 813 Field TFS02 - Reference Number (5-digit tax type code)
EDI 813 Field TFS03 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field TFS04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field TFS05 - ID Code Qualifier (24: EIN, 34: SSN)
EDI 813 Field TFS06 - ID Code (company EIN)
EDI 813 Field TFS07 - Tax Period End Date
EDI 813 Field TFS08 - Name Control ID (only used for unenrolled companies)
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 813 Field INNER REF01 - Reference Number Qualifier (new/original ref num)
EDI 813 Field INNER REF02 - Reference Number
EDI 813 Field INNER REF03 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
FGS Segment Code
EDI 813 Field FGS01 - Assigned Identification
Segment Separator
TIA Segment Code
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA01 - Tax Info ID Number
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA02 - Monetary Amount
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA03 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 813 Field INNER TIA07 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
BTA Segment Code
EDI 151 Field BTA01 - Ack Type (AD: ack, RD: nak (reject))
EDI 151 Field BTA02 - Ack Date
EDI 151 Field BTA03 - Adjusted Collected Balance (blank = normal, AB if different than 813)
EDI 151 Field BTA04 - Monetary Amount (only if different than 813)
Segment Separator
BTI Segment Code
EDI 151 Field BTI01 - Ref Num Qualifier (BT = Batch Number)
EDI 151 Field BTI02 - Ref Num (original ST02 from 813)
EDI 151 Field BTI03 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 151 Field BTI04 - Bulk Provider ID code (TIN)
EDI 151 Field BTI05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field BTI06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field BTI07 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 151 Field BTI08 - ID Code (Confirmation Number)
EDI 151 Field BTI09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field BTI10 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field BTI11 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field BTI12 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
TFS Segment Code
EDI 151 Field TFS01 - Ref Num Qualifier (F8 = Original Reference Number, 94 = Same Day File Identification Number)
EDI 151 Field TFS02 - Ref Num (if TFS01 is F8 then this is REF02 from TFS Loop, else this is Same Day Transaction Set Control Num ST02 from 813 file)
EDI 151 Field TFS03 - Ref Num Qualifier (1Q = Error Identification Code, 93 = Funds Authorization, 4N = Same Day Special Payment Reference Number)
EDI 151 Field TFS04 - Ref Number (Error Code, Acknowledgment EFT Number, Same Day Payment Authorization Number)
EDI 151 Field TFS05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field TFS06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field TFS07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field TFS08 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
BTI Segment Code
EDI 826 Field BTI01 - Ref Num Qualifier (4N = Special Payment Reference Number)
EDI 826 Field BTI02 - Ref Num (TFS04 from 151)
EDI 826 Field BTI03 - ID Code Qualifier (SV = Service Provider Number)
EDI 826 Field BTI04 - Bulk Provider ID code (TIN)
EDI 826 Field BTI05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI08 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI10 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI11 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field BTI12 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
TFS Segment Code
EDI 826 Field TFS01 - Ref Num Qualifier (F8 = Original Reference Number)
EDI 826 Field TFS02 - Ref Num (From REF02 of original 813)
EDI 826 Field TFS03 - Ref Num Qualifier (93 = Funds Authorization)
EDI 826 Field TFS04 - Ref Number (payment acknowledgement number)
EDI 826 Field TFS05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field TFS06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field TFS07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 826 Field TFS08 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
RIC Segment Code
EDI 827 Field RIC01 - Error Condition Code (830 = Payment Refused/Rejected (tax not paid/still due), 011 = Notice of Change (tax paid but NOC must be addressed))
EDI 827 Field RIC02 - Monetary Amount (amount of returned transaction)
EDI 827 Field RIC03 - Credit/Debit Flag (C = credit, D = debit)
EDI 827 Field RIC04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 827 Field RIC05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 827 Field RIC06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 827 Field RIC07 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 827 Field REF01 - Reference Number Qualifier (93 = Funds Authorization, 1Q = Error Code, ZZ = Mutually Defined (NOC info))
EDI 827 Field REF02 - Reference Number (If REF01 is 93, this field maps to BTI08 in the 151 file)
Segment Separator
B2A Segment Code
EDI 821 Field B2A01 -
EDI 821 Field B2A02 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
DTM Segment Code
EDI 821 Field DTM01 -
EDI 821 Field DTM02 -
EDI 821 Field DTM03 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field DTM04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field DTM05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field DTM06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field DTM07 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
TRN Segment Code
EDI 821 Field TRN01 -
EDI 821 Field TRN02 -
EDI 821 Field TRN03 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field TRN04 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
ENT Segment Code
EDI 821 Field ENT01 -
EDI 821 Field ENT02 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT03 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT08 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ENT09 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
ACT Segment Code
EDI 821 Field ACT01 -
EDI 821 Field ACT02 -
EDI 821 Field ACT03 -
EDI 821 Field ACT04 -
EDI 821 Field ACT05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ACT06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ACT07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field ACT08 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
FIR Segment Code
EDI 821 Field FIR01 -
EDI 821 Field FIR02 -
EDI 821 Field FIR03 -
EDI 821 Field FIR04 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR06 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR07 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR08 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR09 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR10 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR11 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 821 Field FIR12 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
ISA Segment Code
Field ISA01 - Authorization Information Qualifier
Field ISA02 - Authorization Info
Field ISA03 - Security Information Qualifier
Field ISA04 - Security Info
Field ISA05 - Interchange ID Qualifier
Field ISA06 - Interchange Sender ID (right-pad to exactly 15 chars)
Field ISA07 - Interchange Receiver ID Qualifier
Field ISA08 - Interchange Receiver ID (right-pad to exactly 15 chars)
Field ISA09 - Interchange Date (YYMMDD)
Field ISA10 - Interchange Time (HHMM)
Field ISA11 - Interchange Control Standards ID
Field ISA12 - Interchange Control Version Number
Field ISA13 - Interchange Control Number
Field ISA14 - Acknowledgment Requested (not related to 997 file)
Field ISA15 - Test Indicator (T = test, P = production)
Field ISA16 - Empty, but needs the field delimiter
Segment Separator
BTI Segment Code
EDI 813 Field BTI01 - Ref Number Qualifier
EDI 813 Field BTI02 - Ref Number
EDI 813 Field BTI03 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 813 Field BTI04 - ID Code
EDI 813 Field BTI05 - Date (CCYYMMDD)
EDI 813 Field BTI06 - not used
EDI 813 Field BTI07 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 813 Field BTI08 - ID Code (Bulk Provider's TIN)
EDI 813 Field BTI09 - State Identification Number
EDI 813 Field BTI10 - EC Account Number of transmitter
Segment Separator
DTM Segment Code
EDI 813 Field DTM01 - Date/Time Qualifier
EDI 813 Field DTM02 - Date
Segment Separator
BPR Segment Code
EDI 813 Field BPR01 - Transaction Handling Code (S for Single Debit, P for Prenotification)
EDI 813 Field BPR02 - Monetary Amount
EDI 813 Field BPR03 - Credit/Debit Flag (C = credit, D = debit)
EDI 813 Field BPR04 - Payment Method Code (ACH for next-day)
EDI 813 Field BPR05 - (CCP/CCD+/CTX)
EDI 813 Field BPR06 - not used
EDI 813 Field BPR07 - not used
EDI 813 Field BPR08 - not used
EDI 813 Field BPR09 - not used
EDI 813 Field BPR10 - not used
EDI 813 Field BPR11 - not used
EDI 813 Field BPR12 - (DFI) ID Number Qualifier (ABA Route/Transit Number)
EDI 813 Field BPR13 - Routing Number
EDI 813 Field BPR14 - Account Number Qualifier (DA/SG)
EDI 813 Field BPR15 - Account Number
EDI 813 Field BPR16 - Settlement Date (CCYYMMDD)
Segment Separator
N1 Segment Code
EDI 813 Field N101 - (FE - Mail Address)
EDI 813 Field N102 - Name
Segment Separator
N2 Segment Code
EDI 813 Field N201 - (Name continued from N102-if necessory)
Segment Separator
N3 Segment Code
EDI 813 Field N301 - Business location
EDI 813 Field N302 - continued address if necessary
Segment Separator
N4 Segment Code
EDI 813 Field N101 - (city)
EDI 813 Field N402 - State
EDI 813 Field N403 - zip code
Segment Separator
TIA Segment Code
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA01 - Tax Field Identification
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA02 - Monetary Amount
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA03 - Fixed format information
Segment Separator
TIA Segment Code
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA01 - Tax Field Identification
EDI 813 Field OUTER TIA02 - Monetary Amount
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 813 Field OUTER REF01 - Reference Number Qualifier
EDI 813 Field OUTER REF02 - Reference Number
Segment Separator
TFS Segment Code
EDI 813 Field TFS01 - Reference Number Qualifier (T6 = Tax Filing)
EDI 813 Field TFS02 - Reference Number (5-digit tax type code)
EDI 813 Field TFS03 - Employers Identification Number
EDI 813 Field TFS04 - FEIN
EDI 813 Field TFS05 - Not used now
EDI 813 Field TFS06 - Not used now
Segment Separator
BTA Segment Code
EDI 151 Field BTA01 - Ack Type (AD: ack, RD: nak (reject))
EDI 151 Field BTA02 - Ack Date
Segment Separator
BTI Segment Code
EDI 151 Field BTI01 - Ref Num Qualifier (BT = Batch Number)
EDI 151 Field BTI02 - Ref Num (original ST02 from 813)
EDI 151 Field BTI03 - ID Code Qualifier
EDI 151 Field BTI04 - Bulk Provider ID code (TIN)
EDI 151 Field BTI05 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
TFS Segment Code
EDI 151 Field TFS01 - Ref Num Qualifier (F8 = Original Reference Number, 94 = Same Day File Identification Number)
EDI 151 Field TFS02 - Ref Num (if TFS01 is F8 then this is REF02 from TFS Loop, else this is Same Day Transaction Set Control Num ST02 from 813 file)
EDI 151 Field TFS03 - Ref Num Qualifier (1Q = Error Identification Code, 93 = Funds Authorization, 4N = Same Day Special Payment Reference Number)
EDI 151 Field TFS04 - Ref Number (Error Code, Acknowledgment EFT Number, Same Day Payment Authorization Number)
EDI 151 Field TFS05 - not used by EFTPS spec
EDI 151 Field TFS06 - not used by EFTPS spec
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 151 Field REF01 - Reference Number Qualifier (FI = File Identifier, TN = Transaction reference Number)
EDI 151 Field REF02 - Reference Number
Segment Separator
REF Segment Code
EDI 151 Field REF01 - Mutually Defined - Taxpayer Identification (T6 = Tax Form name, ZZ = Business name)
EDI 151 Field REF02 - Not Used
EDI 151 Field REF03 - Name
Segment Separator
PBI Segment Code
EDI 151 Field PBI01 - Error Code
EDI 151 Field PBI02 - (U= Reject, CF= Confirmation, WQ= Accept)
EDI 151 Field PBI03 - Confirmation or Error message
EDI 151 Field PBI01 - Unique Confirmation Number
Segment Separator
AK3 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK301 - Segment Id Code (Position Number with Error)
EDI 997 Field AK302 - Segment Position in Transaction Set (Which element has the error)
EDI 997 Field AK303 - Loop identifier Code (Loop where error is located)
EDI 997 Field AK304 - Segment syntax error
Segment Separator
AK4 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK401 - Position in Segment (which position has error)
EDI 997 Field AK402 - Data element reference Number
EDI 997 Field AK403 - Data element syntax error code
EDI 997 Field AK404 - Copy of bad data element
Segment Separator
AK5 Segment Code
EDI 997 Field AK501 - Trans Set Ack Code (A = Accepted, R = Rejected)
EDI 997 Field AK502 - Transaction set syntax error code
Segment Separator
